# BP-95 positive: the client response body has no close or ownership transfer
lang: go
file: BP-95-vulnerable.go
variant: net-http
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func fetch() {
	req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", "https://example.com", nil)
	if err != nil {
		return
	}
	resp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
	if err != nil {
		return
	}
	_ = resp
}
